title: interface is giving internal error
body:
Hi,
I have an axi interface definition (from another repo which has tests running on xilinx & modelsim tools) and I'm getting a weird internal error:

%Error: Internal Error: axi_intf.sv:4:11: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:423: Module/etc never assigned a symbol entry?
    4 | interface AXI_LITE #(
      |           ^~~~~~~~

Any idea why this is happening and how to get around it? In the meantime I remove the interface but I'd like to understand what's wrong.
Thanks
